use_cases: Tracking weekly performance metrics and KPIs in dashboards
Visualizing daily progress data across a 7-day period
Displaying interactive analytics with hover states and selection
Rendering animated bar charts with gradient backgrounds for SaaS metrics
Showing time-series data with connected lines and data points
ai_summary: A weekly KPI bar chart component featuring animated bars with gradient backgrounds, interactive selection states, and connected line indicators. Built with Framer Motion for smooth path animations and hover effects. Includes customizable colors, dynamic scaling based on data values, and is optimized for dashboard use in SaaS and analytics applications.
